title: Heteroneurum argutum
taxonomy: Heteroneurum argutum is a species of fly in the family Phoridae. It is a type of fungus gnat. The classification of Heteroneurum argutum includes its genus and species levels, which are Heteroneurum and argutum, respectively. The family Phoridae is a part of the larger order Diptera, which comprises all flies. The classification of Heteroneurum argutum can be represented as follows: Kingdom: Animalia, Phylum: Arthropoda, Class: Insecta, Order: Diptera, Family: Phoridae, Genus: Heteroneurum, Species: H. argutum.
